start.line: Good evening. This unit is performing routine harmonic maintenance. Is the volume... troubling?

options.text: We've patched you into the colony net. Sing to THEM.

sing.line: Singing is a strong word. The sky-rays vocalize on seventeen bands. This unit... answers. Routinely. As part of maintenance.

status.line: Sixty years, four months, nine days: nominal. Visitors, current: one. Visitors, previous: zero. This unit keeps excellent records.

zero.line: The beacon guides ships PAST Gale Reach, Ensign. That is its function. It is very good at it.

accept.line: ...Every band? And they will answer back? ...This unit finds that the maintenance schedule permits it. Volume: considerate. Thank you, Ensign.

options.text: Carry on, Mote. Sing them something nice.
